# Forefront - Terraform Provider





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `api_key` (String, Sensitive) API Key for Forefront authentication. May also be provided via FOREFRONT_API_KEY environment variable.
- `base_url` (String) Base URL for the Forefront API. May also be provided via FOREFRONT_BASE_URL environment variable.
